description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On August 22, 2025 at 10:15 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Santa Monica, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on 2nd Street at Colorado Avenue.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southeastbound in the left lane on 2nd Street when it began to change lanes to the right lane and came to a 
stop for the red light at the intersection with Colorado Avenue and to yield to law enforcement and emergency vehicles that were blocking 
vehicles from continuing southeastbound on 2nd Street. While the Waymo AV remained stopped partially in the left lane and partially in the 
bike lane, a law enforcement officer arrived and began to direct traffic around the Waymo AV. A passenger car that was initially stopped 
behind the Waymo AV proceeded to maneuver around the left of the Waymo AV, and the right side of the passenger car made contact with 
the rear left of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The 
passenger car sustained damage
Print
Clear Form
